$comment: Role -> pi model spec (provider/model:thinking). No secrets here; API keys live in the gitignored auth.json / env, which pi resolves on its own. HOME machine: anthropic (Claude Max) + deepseek + google/gemini (AI Studio key in $GEMINI_API_KEY, used for web-search + vision). Model ids verified against `pi --list-models` on 2026-06-22. Read by agents/_lib/roles.mjs (skills + subagent extension). NOTE: deepseek-v4 (flash AND pro) is TEXT-ONLY (images:no) — vision roles must stay on gemini/anthropic. Price order: deepseek-v4-flash < deepseek-v4-pro < gemini-3.5-flash (~sonnet-class) < opus-4-8. Tiers: opus-4-8=top judgment; deepseek-v4-pro=cheap real-code; deepseek-v4-flash=fast mechanical (text only); gemini-3.5-flash=sonnet-class (better metrics than sonnet) — the vision-capable mid model (deepseek can't do images) + grounded search.
